verification_rule: VERIFIED requires linked code, reproducible test, and runtime evidence.

layers.name: market_data
layers.evidence: data/research/manifests/; canonical OHLCV v2, exchange-declared Kraken base/quote mapping and public Kraken Futures collector

layers.name: data_quality
layers.evidence: reports/research/canonical_ohlcv/

layers.name: temporal_semantics
layers.evidence: OHLCV v2 event/available/ingestion fields; batch feature snapshots preserve unknown ingestion time as a blocker and prove deterministic no-look-ahead feature parity; future shadow intents now require immutable feature-snapshot evidence with zero unknown ingestion timestamps and proven runtime parity; current-run VPS smoke produced a READY feature bundle with zero unknown ingestion timestamps

layers.name: lineage
layers.evidence: data/research/manifests/; economic/provenance fingerprints and source-to-feature snapshot fingerprints

layers.name: feature_registry
layers.evidence: src/autobot/v2/research/feature_registry.py; batch-only deterministic feature bundles from explicit canonical mappings; shadow-capable artifacts bind exact feature-bundle fingerprints and versions rather than mutable manifest paths

layers.name: regime_analysis
layers.evidence: bounded segmentation trial log; reports/research/

layers.name: hypothesis_specification
layers.evidence: docs/research/alpha_hypotheses.json

layers.name: strategy_adapters
layers.evidence: research-only funding/basis adapter uses explicit futures-to-spot mappings, spot-EUR PnL and point-in-time availability; it remains data-gated before any shadow consideration

layers.name: research_memory
layers.evidence: data/research/

layers.name: experiment_registry
layers.evidence: append-only SQLite experiments/trials/transitions/holdouts; verified feature snapshot provenance is required and material trial plans are registered before manifested runner validation; a passed terminal SHADOW_REVIEW now requires an immutable, non-optimizing final-holdout review

layers.name: statistical_validation
layers.evidence: deterministic PSR/DSR/bootstrap diagnostics are bound to fixed funding/basis OOS spot-EUR trades only after walk-forward; pre-run registry evidence can only increase the DSR trial-count floor and no result can promote paper/live

layers.name: multiple_testing
layers.evidence: append-only parameter/pair/timeframe/regime plans plus crossed candidate configurations; immutable holdouts cannot be used for optimization and final shadow-review acceptance requires recorded non-optimizing holdout evidence; terminal material experiments cannot be silently retried

layers.name: portfolio
layers.evidence: research target construction is contract-based; blocked direct runtime entries now produce a provenance-required TargetPortfolio preview, but runtime sizing is not yet replaced

layers.name: sizing
layers.evidence: docs/research/strategy_risk_mandates.json; direct pyramiding sizing is fail-closed pending v1 risk integration

layers.name: cost_model
layers.evidence: shared research cost model with central/pessimistic/stress scenario projection; paper parity remains unverified

layers.name: capacity
layers.evidence: observed-liquidity participation cap; no depth history is invented

layers.name: execution_simulation
layers.evidence: contract-driven shadow simulation covers latency, partial/no fill, expiry and conservative scenarios; paper engine remains separately audited

layers.name: governance
layers.evidence: append-only research artifact registry; shadow-capable artifacts bind to a passed terminal SHADOW_REVIEW experiment fingerprint, explicit human approval reference, immutable final-holdout review, immutable non-authorizing risk-mandate evidence, and point-in-time feature-snapshot evidence with proven runtime parity; artifact serialization self-verifies immutable identity and a batch-only SQLite read-only resolver returns a reference only for an existing SHADOW_ELIGIBLE or SHADOW artifact; the CLI cannot start shadow, promote paper or enable live

layers.name: shadow
layers.evidence: point-in-time batch/shadow target parity and monotonic risk-reduction policy; blocked runtime BUY signals expose non-executable contract previews only; a preview intent requires a self-consistent strategy artifact reference matching strategy, version, data snapshot, feature versions, and at least one runtime-parity-proven feature snapshot; runtime registry resolution remains intentionally outside the hot path

layers.name: official_paper
layers.evidence: audit found optimistic market fills and incomplete stop/partial-fill lifecycle; direct entries, shadow-to-paper bridge, and dynamic paper-capital reallocation are disabled by default

layers.name: independent_risk
layers.evidence: docs/research/strategy_risk_mandates.json; deterministic immutable mandate fingerprints are bound to shadow artifacts, cannot authorize paper/live, and expired or invalid mandate timestamps fail closed in the research pre-trade gate; normalized technical incidents can only reduce, block or kill the research/shadow risk envelope

layers.name: oms_ems
layers.evidence: hermetic shadow OMS has strict transitions and duplicate protection; read-only runtime audit and migration planning expose missing provenance without inventing canonical intents or lifecycle states; canonical shadow intents require a matching immutable strategy-artifact reference plus runtime-parity-proven feature and non-authorizing risk-mandate evidence that is still current at intent creation, while future persisted orders require a non-blank strategy_id, persist it atomically with the order, capture an explicit prior state for transitions, and reject orphan transitions; the runtime handler bypass remains incomplete but fail-closed for new direct entries

layers.name: ledger_reconciliation_tca
layers.evidence: append-only shadow ledger reconstructs positions, blocks divergences and records TCA; read-only runtime audit plus deterministic migration planning quarantine untraceable legacy records and leave source SQLite unchanged

layers.name: monitoring_security_resilience
layers.evidence: hermetic fail-closed incidents; an isolated timed runtime audit for SQLite integrity, market-data freshness, disk capacity and explicit WebSocket evidence; bounded retry; integrity-checked SQLite backup with a source mounted read-only; disabled-by-default isolated systemd backup job; a temporary backup/restore drill that retains no artifact; a disposable read-only restore drill that verifies schema and row counts without altering its backup input; non-authorizing readiness dossier; process-scoped SQLite workers are released on normal and failing orchestrator shutdown paths; data collectors have a research-only writable mount boundary; and an automatic post-collection data-capability scan
